question_en: What did the UASF make explicit?
choices_en: A minor issue of branding only
That validating users could act as constitutional actors in Bitcoin.
A debate with no constitutional stakes
choices_ko: 검증 사용자가 비트코인 안에서 헌정적 행위자로 작동할 수 있다는 점이다.
explanation_en: That validating users could act as constitutional actors in Bitcoin.
